intro: Calonyction aculeatum, also known as the prickly calonyction or prickly moonflower, is a flowering vine native to tropical regions of Central and South America. This plant is valued for its potential health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help alleviate symptoms of arthritis, fever, and respiratory issues. The bioactive constituents of Calonyction aculeatum include flavonoids, alkaloids, and glycosides, such as calonyctine and calonyctonine, which are responsible for its medicinal properties.
